<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="pt-br">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>UPSPRO Tecnologia — Soluções em Nobreak até 3KVA</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@400;700;800;900&family=Barlow:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root{--b1:#0284c7;--b2:#0ea5e9;--b3:#38bdf8;--navy:#020e1a;--navy2:#041422;--card:#051c30;--border:rgba(14,165,233,0.18);--text:#d0e8f8;--muted:#5b8aaa;--white:#f0f9ff;--gold:#f59e0b;--green:#22c55e;--orange:#f97316;}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif;background:var(--navy);color:var(--text);overflow-x:hidden;}
.hero{position:relative;min-height:92svh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;padding:56px 20px 72px;overflow:hidden;}
.hero-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 90% 65% at 50% -10%,rgba(2,132,199,.3) 0%,transparent 65%),linear-gradient(180deg,#020e1a 0%,#041422 100%);}
.hero-grid{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(14,165,233,.05) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(14,165,233,.05) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:52px 52px;animation:gridMove 24s linear infinite;}
@keyframes gridMove{0%{background-position:0 0}100%{background-position:52px 52px}}
.hero-logo{position:relative;z-index:1;margin-bottom:24px;animation:fdDown .5s ease both;}
.hero-logo img{height:60px;width:auto;display:block;margin:0 auto;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 18px rgba(14,165,233,.5));}
.hero-content{position:relative;z-index:1;max-width:700px;}
.hero-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;background:rgba(14,165,233,.1);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.28);border-radius:999px;padding:5px 14px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--b3);margin-bottom:20px;animation:fdDown .55s .05s ease both;}
.bdot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--b3);animation:pulse 2s infinite;}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.3}}
.hero h1{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:clamp(44px,9vw,86px);line-height:.92;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:10px;animation:fdDown .6s .1s ease both;}
.hero h1 em{font-style:normal;color:var(--b3);}
.hero-sub{font-size:clamp(13px,2vw,16px);font-weight:300;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:32px;line-height:1.7;animation:fdDown .6s .15s ease both;}
.hero-cta{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;background:var(--b2);border:none;border-radius:11px;padding:14px 28px;color:white;font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif;font-weight:600;font-size:15px;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;transition:all .25s;animation:fdDown .6s .2s ease both;box-shadow:0 0 32px rgba(14,165,233,.35);}
.hero-cta:hover{background:var(--b3);transform:translateY(-2px);}
.hero-scroll{position:absolute;bottom:22px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:5px;color:var(--muted);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;animation:fdIn 1s 1.2s ease both;}
.scroll-line{width:1px;height:30px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent,var(--b2));animation:scrollAnim 2s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes scrollAnim{0%,100%{transform:scaleY(1);opacity:1}50%{transform:scaleY(.5);opacity:.4}}
.quiz-section{background:var(--navy2);border-top:1px solid var(--border);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.quiz-wrap{max-width:640px;margin:0 auto;padding:64px 20px;text-align:center;}
.eyebrow{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:4px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--b2);margin-bottom:10px;}
.quiz-title{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:clamp(22px,4vw,36px);color:var(--white);margin-bottom:6px;}
.quiz-sub{color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;margin-bottom:24px;}
.prog{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:24px;}
.prog-dot{width:28px;height:4px;border-radius:2px;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);transition:all .3s;}
.prog-dot.active{background:var(--b2);box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--b2);}
.prog-dot.done{background:var(--green);}
.qs{display:none;animation:fdUp .35s ease both;}
.qs.show{display:block;}
.q-grid{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.q-btn{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:13px;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:14px 18px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;text-align:left;color:var(--text);font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif;width:100%;}
.q-btn:hover{border-color:var(--b2);background:rgba(14,165,233,.07);transform:translateX(4px);}
.q-icon{font-size:22px;width:30px;text-align:center;flex-shrink:0;}
.q-lbl{font-weight:600;font-size:14px;color:var(--white);line-height:1.2;}
.q-desc{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px;}
.q-arr{margin-left:auto;color:var(--muted);font-size:18px;flex-shrink:0;}
.q-step-title{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:19px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:5px;}
.q-step-sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:16px;}
.btn-back{background:none;border:none;color:var(--muted);font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;padding:7px 10px;transition:color .2s;display:inline-block;margin-top:4px;}
.btn-back:hover{color:var(--text);}
.result-section{display:none;background:var(--navy);border-top:1px solid var(--border);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.result-section.open{display:block;animation:fdUp .4s ease;}
.result-wrap{max-width:860px;margin:0 auto;padding:52px 20px;}
.res-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--green);margin-bottom:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;}
.res-label::before{content:'';width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green);display:block;}
.res-h{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:clamp(20px,3.5vw,34px);color:var(--white);margin-bottom:5px;}
.res-desc{color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:18px;}
.rack-note{display:none;background:rgba(245,158,11,.08);border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,.3);border-left:3px solid var(--gold);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 15px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:13px;color:#fde68a;line-height:1.6;}
.rack-note.show{display:block;}
.rack-note strong{color:var(--gold);}
.res-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:15px;margin-bottom:14px;align-items:start;}
@media(max-width:600px){.res-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
.res-gallery{background:#fff;border:1px solid #bae6fd;border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 2px 20px rgba(14,165,233,.08);}
.res-gal-main{height:220px;background:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:8px;}
.res-gal-main img{max-width:100%;max-height:100%;object-fit:contain;}
.res-gal-thumbs{display:flex;gap:5px;padding:8px 10px;background:#f0f9ff;border-top:1px solid #bae6fd;}
.res-thumb{width:54px;height:42px;border-radius:6px;border:2px solid #bae6fd;cursor:pointer;background:#fff;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;transition:all .2s;}
.res-thumb img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;display:block;}
.res-thumb.active,.res-thumb:hover{border-color:var(--b1);}
.res-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:18px;}
.res-model{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:20px;color:var(--white);margin:8px 0 2px;}
.res-sub{color:var(--muted);font-size:11px;margin-bottom:13px;}
.res-specs{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:7px;}
.spec-box{background:var(--navy);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:9px 11px;}
.spec-l{font-size:9px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:2px;}
.spec-v{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--b3);}
.prod-tag{display:inline-block;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:999px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.ti{background:rgba(14,165,233,.15);color:var(--b3);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.3);}
.ts{background:rgba(245,158,11,.12);color:var(--gold);border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,.3);}
.to{background:rgba(249,115,22,.12);color:var(--orange);border:1px solid rgba(249,115,22,.3);}
.addons-ttl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin:16px 0 8px;}
.addon{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:11px;padding:12px 15px;margin-bottom:7px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;user-select:none;}
.addon:hover{border-color:var(--b2);}
.addon.sel{border-color:var(--green);background:rgba(34,197,94,.06);}
.addon-chk{width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:5px;border:2px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:white;transition:all .2s;}
.addon.sel .addon-chk{background:var(--green);border-color:var(--green);}
.addon-name{font-weight:600;font-size:13px;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:1px;}
.addon-desc{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);}
.addon-badge{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(245,158,11,.12);color:var(--gold);border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,.25);white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0;margin-left:auto;}
.calc{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:17px;margin:14px 0;}
.calc-ttl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:12px;}
.calc-rows{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.c-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;}
.c-name,.c-w{background:var(--navy);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:8px 10px;color:var(--text);font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif;font-size:12px;outline:none;}
.c-name{flex:1;}.c-name:focus,.c-w:focus{border-color:var(--b2);}
.c-name::placeholder,.c-w::placeholder{color:var(--muted);}
.c-w{width:80px;text-align:right;}
.c-del{background:none;border:none;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:18px;padding:3px 5px;transition:color .2s;line-height:1;}
.c-del:hover{color:#f87171;}
.c-add{width:100%;background:none;border:1px dashed var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:8px;color:var(--muted);font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;}
.c-add:hover{border-color:var(--b2);color:var(--b3);}
.c-res{display:flex;justify-content:space-around;background:var(--navy);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:12px;margin-top:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;}
.c-col{text-align:center;}
.c-lbl{font-size:9px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:3px;}
.c-val{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:20px;}
.cm{color:var(--muted);}.cok{color:var(--green);}.cwarn{color:var(--gold);}.cover{color:#f87171;}
.ov{display:none;background:rgba(239,68,68,.08);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.3);border-radius:10px;padding:13px 15px;margin-top:10px;}
.ov.show{display:block;animation:fdUp .3s ease;}
.ov-ttl{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:16px;color:#f87171;margin-bottom:5px;}
.ov-body{font-size:12px;color:#fca5a5;line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:9px;}
.ov-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:#25d366;border:none;border-radius:7px;padding:8px 13px;color:white;font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif;font-weight:600;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;}
.ov-btn:hover{background:#1fba59;}
.cta-row{display:flex;gap:9px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:14px;}
.btn-wa{flex:1;min-width:160px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:7px;background:#25d366;border:none;border-radius:9px;padding:13px 18px;color:white;font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;transition:all .2s;}
.btn-wa:hover{background:#1fba59;transform:translateY(-1px);}
.btn-restart{background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:9px;padding:13px 18px;color:var(--muted);font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;white-space:nowrap;}
.btn-restart:hover{border-color:var(--b2);color:var(--text);}
.catalog-wrap{max-width:1120px;margin:0 auto;padding:68px 20px;}
.sec-eyebrow{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:4px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--b2);margin-bottom:10px;}
.sec-title{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:clamp(24px,4vw,44px);color:var(--white);margin-bottom:8px;}
.sec-desc{color:var(--muted);font-size:14px;max-width:480px;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:40px;}
.products-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(300px,1fr));gap:19px;}
.prod-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;transition:all .3s;display:flex;flex-direction:column;position:relative;}
.prod-card:hover{border-color:rgba(14,165,233,.5);transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 14px 44px rgba(14,165,233,.12);}
.prod-card.hi{border-color:rgba(14,165,233,.45);}
.hi-badge{position:absolute;top:12px;right:12px;z-index:5;background:var(--b1);color:#fff;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:999px;}
.ph{padding:17px 17px 0;}
.pn{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:20px;color:var(--white);line-height:1.05;margin-bottom:2px;}
.pp{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);}
.gallery-wrap{margin:10px 0 0;}
.gallery-main{height:188px;background:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:6px;border-top:1px solid #e0f2fe;border-bottom:1px solid #e0f2fe;overflow:hidden;}
.gallery-main img{max-width:100%;max-height:100%;object-fit:contain;transition:transform .3s;display:block;}
.prod-card:hover .gallery-main img{transform:scale(1.04);}
.gallery-thumbs{display:flex;gap:5px;padding:7px 10px;background:#f0f9ff;}
.thumb{background:none;border:2px solid #bae6fd;border-radius:5px;padding:0;cursor:pointer;overflow:hidden;width:46px;height:37px;flex-shrink:0;transition:border-color .15s;}
.thumb img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;background:#fff;display:block;}
.thumb.active,.thumb:hover{border-color:var(--b1);}
.pb{padding:12px 17px 17px;flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
.pspecs{list-style:none;flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;margin-bottom:11px;}
.pspecs li{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:7px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text);line-height:1.4;}
.pspecs li::before{content:'✓';color:var(--b3);font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;}
.p-cta{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:7px;background:var(--b2);border:none;border-radius:9px;padding:11px;color:white;font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif;font-weight:600;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;width:100%;transition:all .2s;}
.p-cta:hover{opacity:.9;transform:translateY(-1px);}
.p-cta.gold{background:var(--b1);}.p-cta.orange{background:#0369a1;}
.spec-section{background:var(--navy2);border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
.spec-wrap{max-width:800px;margin:0 auto;padding:64px 20px;}
.spec-divider{width:44px;height:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--b1),var(--b3));border-radius:2px;margin:0 auto 36px;}
.spec-layout{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:28px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.spec-photo{width:96px;height:96px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;border:3px solid var(--b2);box-shadow:0 0 28px rgba(14,165,233,.35);display:block;flex-shrink:0;}
.spec-info{flex:1;min-width:200px;}
.spec-name{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:23px;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:2px;}
.spec-role{font-size:12px;color:var(--b3);margin-bottom:11px;}
.spec-txt{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:15px;}
.spec-txt em{color:var(--text);font-style:normal;}
.spec-wa{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;background:#25d366;border:none;border-radius:9px;padding:10px 18px;color:white;font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;transition:all .2s;}
.spec-wa:hover{background:#1fba59;transform:translateY(-1px);}
.signoff{background:var(--navy);border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:36px 20px;text-align:center;}
.signoff-msg{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:18px;color:var(--b3);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:7px;}
.signoff-sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);}
footer{border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:18px 20px;text-align:center;color:var(--muted);font-size:11px;}
footer strong{color:var(--b3);}
@keyframes fdDown{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-16px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
@keyframes fdUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(16px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
@keyframes fdIn{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px);transition:opacity .6s ease,transform .6s ease;}
.reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
@media(max-width:560px){.products-grid,.cta-row,.spec-layout{flex-direction:column;}.spec-photo{margin:0 auto;}.btn-wa{min-width:unset;}}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div><div class="hero-grid"></div>
  <div class="hero-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="UPSPRO Tecnologia"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-badge"><span class="bdot"></span>Soluções plug &amp; play · Até 3KVA</div>
    <h1>NOBREAK<br>CERTO,<br><em>AGORA.</em></h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">Catálogo consultivo para simplificar a escolha da proteção ideal<br>para o seu equipamento, escritório ou servidor.</p>
    <a href="#quiz" class="hero-cta">⚡ Encontrar meu nobreak ideal</a>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-scroll"><span>Explorar</span><div class="scroll-line"></div></div>
</section>

<div class="quiz-section" id="quiz">
<div class="quiz-wrap">
  <p class="eyebrow">Guia rápido</p>
  <h2 class="quiz-title">Qual é a sua necessidade?</h2>
  <p class="quiz-sub">Responda as perguntas e receba a solução mais adequada</p>
  <div class="prog">
    <div class="prog-dot active" id="pd0"></div>
    <div class="prog-dot" id="pd1"></div>
    <div class="prog-dot" id="pd2"></div>
    <div class="prog-dot" id="pd3"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="qs show" id="qs0">
    <div class="q-grid">
      <button class="q-btn" onclick="qPick('uso','residencial')"><span class="q-icon">🏠</span><div><div class="q-lbl">Residencial / Gamer</div><div class="q-desc">Computador, TV, Xbox, modem, câmeras</div></div><span class="q-arr">›</span></button>
      <button class="q-btn" onclick="qPick('uso','escritorio')"><span class="q-icon">🏢</span><div><div class="q-lbl">Escritório / Comércio</div><div class="q-desc">Estações de trabalho, PDV, CFTV, impressoras</div></div><span class="q-arr">›</span></button>
      <button class="q-btn" onclick="qPick('uso','servidor')"><span class="q-icon">🖥️</span><div><div class="q-lbl">Servidor / Ambiente crítico</div><div class="q-desc">Servidor, rack, sistema sem tolerância a falhas</div></div><span class="q-arr">›</span></button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="qs" id="qs1">
    <div class="q-step-title">Há grupo gerador no local?</div>
    <div class="q-step-sub">Define a tecnologia mais indicada de nobreak</div>
    <div class="q-grid">
      <button class="q-btn" onclick="qPick('gerador','sim')"><span class="q-icon">⚙️</span><div><div class="q-lbl">Sim, temos gerador</div><div class="q-desc">Recomendamos tecnologia on-line (dupla conversão)</div></div><span class="q-arr">›</span></button>
      <button class="q-btn" onclick="qPick('gerador','nao')"><span class="q-icon">🔋</span><div><div class="q-lbl">Não, somente rede elétrica</div><div class="q-desc">Nobreak senoidal interativo atende bem</div></div><span class="q-arr">›</span></button>
    </div>
    <button class="btn-back" onclick="qBack()">← Voltar</button>
  </div>
  <div class="qs" id="qs2">
    <div class="q-step-title">Há espaço físico além do rack?</div>
    <div class="q-step-sub">Define o formato — torre ou rack</div>
    <div class="q-grid">
      <button class="q-btn" onclick="qPick('espaco','torre')"><span class="q-icon">🗼</span><div><div class="q-lbl">Sim — piso, bancada ou sala técnica</div><div class="q-desc">Nobreak modelo torre (vertical)</div></div><span class="q-arr">›</span></button>
      <button class="q-btn" onclick="qPick('espaco','rack')"><span class="q-icon">🗄️</span><div><div class="q-lbl">Apenas dentro do rack servidor</div><div class="q-desc">Nobreak rack — módulo de bateria em torre, externo</div></div><span class="q-arr">›</span></button>
    </div>
    <button class="btn-back" onclick="qBack()">← Voltar</button>
  </div>
  <div class="qs" id="qs3">
    <div class="q-step-title" id="qs3-title"></div>
    <div class="q-step-sub">Selecione o perfil mais próximo</div>
    <div class="q-grid" id="qs3-opts"></div>
    <button class="btn-back" onclick="qBack()">← Voltar</button>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="result-section" id="result-section">
<div class="result-wrap">
  <div class="res-label">Solução recomendada para você</div>
  <h2 class="res-h" id="res-h"></h2>
  <p class="res-desc" id="res-desc"></p>
  <div class="rack-note" id="rack-note">🔋 <strong>Atenção — módulo de expansão:</strong> Este modelo é instalado no rack, mas o módulo de bateria PRO III é em <strong>formato TORRE</strong> e deve ficar posicionado ao lado ou próximo ao rack.</div>
  <div class="res-layout">
    <div class="res-gallery">
      <div class="res-gal-main"><img id="res-img" src="" alt="produto" loading="lazy"></div>
      <div class="res-gal-thumbs" id="res-thumbs"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="res-card">
      <div id="res-tag"></div>
      <div class="res-model" id="res-model"></div>
      <div class="res-sub" id="res-sub"></div>
      <div class="res-specs" id="res-specs"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="addons-wrap">
    <div class="addons-ttl">➕ Opcionais — adicione à sua solução</div>
    <div id="addons-list"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="calc">
    <div class="calc-ttl">⏱ Calcule autonomia e verifique a carga</div>
    <div class="calc-rows" id="calc-rows"></div>
    <button class="c-add" onclick="addRow()">+ Adicionar equipamento</button>
    <div class="c-res">
      <div class="c-col"><div class="c-lbl">Carga total</div><div class="c-val cm" id="c-load">— W</div></div>
      <div class="c-col"><div class="c-lbl">Autonomia padrão</div><div class="c-val cm" id="c-std">—</div></div>
      <div class="c-col"><div class="c-lbl">Com módulo externo</div><div class="c-val cm" id="c-exp">—</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ov" id="ov">
      <div class="ov-ttl" id="ov-ttl"></div>
      <div class="ov-body" id="ov-body"></div>
      <a id="ov-wa" class="ov-btn" href="#" target="_blank"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="white"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347z"/><path d="M12 0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12c0 2.139.563 4.143 1.54 5.877L.057 23.516a.75.75 0 0 0 .927.927l5.639-1.483A11.952 11.952 0 0 0 12 24c6.627 0 12-5.373 12-12S18.627 0 12 0zm0 21.75a9.713 9.713 0 0 1-4.957-1.355l-.355-.213-3.682.967.983-3.587-.234-.369A9.713 9.713 0 0 1 2.25 12C2.25 6.615 6.615 2.25 12 2.25S21.75 6.615 21.75 12 17.385 21.75 12 21.75z"/></svg> Falar com especialista</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="cta-row">
    <a id="res-wa" href="#" class="btn-wa" target="_blank"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="white"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347z"/><path d="M12 0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12c0 2.139.563 4.143 1.54 5.877L.057 23.516a.75.75 0 0 0 .927.927l5.639-1.483A11.952 11.952 0 0 0 12 24c6.627 0 12-5.373 12-12S18.627 0 12 0zm0 21.75a9.713 9.713 0 0 1-4.957-1.355l-.355-.213-3.682.967.983-3.587-.234-.369A9.713 9.713 0 0 1 2.25 12C2.25 6.615 6.615 2.25 12 2.25S21.75 6.615 21.75 12 17.385 21.75 12 21.75z"/></svg> Quero essa solução!</a>
    <button class="btn-restart" onclick="restartQuiz()">↩ Recomeçar</button>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<section><div class="catalog-wrap">
  <div class="reveal">
    <p class="sec-eyebrow">Catálogo completo</p>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Todas as soluções até 3KVA</h2>
    <p class="sec-desc">Proteção de energia plug &amp; play para cada necessidade. Para projetos acima de 3KVA, fale com o especialista.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="products-grid reveal"><div class="prod-card" data-card="0"><div class="ph"><span class="prod-tag ti">Interativo</span><div class="pn">Slim LED 800VA</div><div class="pp">400W · Residencial & Gamer</div></div><div class="gallery-wrap" data-card="0"><div class="gallery-main"><img id="card-img-0" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="produto" loading="lazy"></div><div class="gallery-thumbs"><button class="thumb active" onclick="setImg(0,0)" title="Foto 1"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="foto 1" loading="lazy"></button><button class="thumb" onclick="setImg(0,1)" title="Foto 2"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="foto 2" loading="lazy"></button><button class="thumb" onclick="setImg(0,2)" title="Foto 3"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="foto 3" loading="lazy"></button></div></div><div class="pb"><ul class="pspecs"><li>Caixa metálica · LED RGB frontal</li><li>Fusível rearmável · Bivolt automático</li><li>4 tomadas NBR 14136 · USB 5V/2A</li><li>Protege PC, TV, Xbox Series S, modem e câmeras</li></ul><a class="p-cta" href="https://wa.me/5511930751665?text=Olá%21%20Tenho%20interesse%20no%20Nobreak%20Slim%20LED%20800VA%20para%20uso%20residencial/gamer.%20Pode%20me%20enviar%20uma%20proposta%3F" target="_blank">💬 Solicitar proposta</a></div></div>
<div class="prod-card hi" data-card="1"><div class="hi-badge">⭐ MAIS VENDIDO</div><div class="ph"><span class="prod-tag ti">Interativo · LCD</span><div class="pn">Slim View 2KVA</div><div class="pp">1200W · Escritório & múltiplos equipamentos</div></div><div class="gallery-wrap" data-card="1"><div class="gallery-main"><img id="card-img-1" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="produto" loading="lazy"></div><div class="gallery-thumbs"><button class="thumb active" onclick="setImg(1,0)" title="Foto 1"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="foto 1" loading="lazy"></button><button class="thumb" onclick="setImg(1,1)" title="Foto 2"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="foto 2" loading="lazy"></button><button class="thumb" onclick="setImg(1,2)" title="Foto 3"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="foto 3" loading="lazy"></button></div></div><div class="pb"><ul class="pspecs"><li>Display LCD laranja — tensão, carga e autonomia</li><li>Alarmes visuais e sonoros completos</li><li>6 tomadas NBR 14136 · Bivolt automático</li><li>Expansão com banco de baterias externo PRO II</li></ul><a class="p-cta gold" href="https://wa.me/5511930751665?text=Olá%21%20Tenho%20interesse%20no%20Nobreak%20Slim%20View%202KVA%20para%20escritório.%20Pode%20me%20enviar%20uma%20proposta%3F" target="_blank">💬 Solicitar proposta</a></div></div>
<div class="prod-card" data-card="2"><div class="ph"><span class="prod-tag ts">Senoidal Puro</span><div class="pn">Slim View Pro 3KVA Torre</div><div class="pp">2100W · Interativo senoidal · Torre</div></div><div class="gallery-wrap" data-card="2"><div class="gallery-main"><img id="card-img-2" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="produto" loading="lazy"></div><div class="gallery-thumbs"><button class="thumb active" onclick="setImg(2,0)" title="Foto 1"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="foto 1" loading="lazy"></button><button class="thumb" onclick="setImg(2,1)" title="Foto 2"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="foto 2" loading="lazy"></button><button class="thumb" onclick="setImg(2,2)" title="Foto 3"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="foto 3" loading="lazy"></button></div></div><div class="pb"><ul class="pspecs"><li>Onda senoidal pura · Tecnologia DSP</li><li>Estabilização True RMS · Display LCD</li><li>9 tomadas NBR 14136 · Gabinete metálico</li><li>Expansão com módulo PRO III externo</li></ul><a class="p-cta" href="https://wa.me/5511930751665?text=Olá%21%20Tenho%20interesse%20no%20Slim%20View%20Pro%203KVA%20Torre.%20Pode%20me%20enviar%20uma%20proposta%3F" target="_blank">💬 Solicitar proposta</a></div></div>
<div class="prod-card" data-card="3"><div class="ph"><span class="prod-tag ts">Senoidal · Rack</span><div class="pn">Slim View Pro Rack 3KVA</div><div class="pp">2100W · Rack · 6 tomadas</div></div><div class="gallery-wrap" data-card="3"><div class="gallery-main"><img id="card-img-3" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="produto" loading="lazy"></div><div class="gallery-thumbs"><button class="thumb active" onclick="setImg(3,0)" title="Foto 1"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="foto 1" loading="lazy"></button><button class="thumb" onclick="setImg(3,1)" title="Foto 2"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="foto 2" loading="lazy"></button></div></div><div class="pb"><ul class="pspecs"><li>Formato rack 3U para armários de rede</li><li>Onda senoidal pura + DSP · Display LCD</li><li>6 tomadas NBR 14136</li><li>Módulo de expansão PRO III em formato TORRE (externo ao rack)</li></ul><a class="p-cta" href="https://wa.me/5511930751665?text=Olá%21%20Tenho%20interesse%20no%20Slim%20View%20Pro%20Rack%203KVA%20para%20rack%20de%20TI.%20Pode%20me%20enviar%20uma%20proposta%3F" target="_blank">💬 Solicitar proposta</a></div></div>
<div class="prod-card" data-card="4"><div class="ph"><span class="prod-tag to">Online · Dupla Conversão</span><div class="pn">High Pro 3KVA Torre</div><div class="pp">2700W · On-line · Missão crítica</div></div><div class="gallery-wrap" data-card="4"><div class="gallery-main"><img id="card-img-4" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="produto" loading="lazy"></div><div class="gallery-thumbs"><button class="thumb active" onclick="setImg(4,0)" title="Foto 1"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="foto 1" loading="lazy"></button><button class="thumb" onclick="setImg(4,1)" title="Foto 2"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="foto 2" loading="lazy"></button><button class="thumb" onclick="setImg(4,2)" title="Foto 3"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="foto 3" loading="lazy"></button></div></div><div class="pb"><ul class="pspecs"><li>On-line dupla conversão — transferência ZERO ms</li><li>Onda senoidal pura · DSP · Modo ECO</li><li>Compatível com grupo gerador</li><li>Placa SNMP RJ45 opcional · Módulo PRO III opcional</li></ul><a class="p-cta orange" href="https://wa.me/5511930751665?text=Olá%21%20Tenho%20interesse%20no%20High%20Pro%203KVA%20Torre%20para%20servidor%20crítico.%20Pode%20me%20enviar%20uma%20proposta%3F" target="_blank">💬 Solicitar proposta</a></div></div>
<div class="prod-card" data-card="5"><div class="ph"><span class="prod-tag to">Online · Rack</span><div class="pn">High Pro Rack 3KVA</div><div class="pp">2700W · On-line · Rack · 6 tomadas</div></div><div class="gallery-wrap" data-card="5"><div class="gallery-main"><img id="card-img-5" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="produto" loading="lazy"></div><div class="gallery-thumbs"><button class="thumb active" onclick="setImg(5,0)" title="Foto 1"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="foto 1" loading="lazy"></button></div></div><div class="pb"><ul class="pspecs"><li>On-line dupla conversão · Rack/Torre convertível</li><li>Onda senoidal pura · 6 tomadas NBR 14136</li><li>Placa SNMP RJ45 com alertas remotos (opcional)</li><li>Módulo de expansão PRO III em formato TORRE (externo ao rack)</li></ul><a class="p-cta orange" href="https://wa.me/5511930751665?text=Olá%21%20Tenho%20interesse%20no%20High%20Pro%20Rack%203KVA%20para%20rack%20crítico.%20Pode%20me%20enviar%20uma%20proposta%3F" target="_blank">💬 Solicitar proposta</a></div></div></div>
</div></section>

<div class="spec-section"><div class="spec-wrap">
  <div class="spec-divider"></div>
  <div class="spec-layout">
    <img class="spec-photo" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Guilherme Gallego">
    <div class="spec-info">
      <div class="spec-name">Guilherme Gallego</div>
      <div class="spec-role">Consultor Comercial em Energia · UPSPRO Tecnologia</div>
      <p class="spec-txt">Este catálogo foi criado pelo <em>Gallego</em> para que parceiros e clientes encontrem o nobreak certo com mais clareza. Se ficou alguma dúvida, ou se precisa de uma solução acima de 3KVA, fala direto com ele. Projetos até <em>600KVA</em> atendidos.</p>
      <a class="spec-wa" href="https://wa.me/5511930751665?text=Olá!%20Vi%20o%20catálogo%20UPSPRO%20e%20gostaria%20de%20tirar%20algumas%20dúvidas." target="_blank"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="white"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347z"/><path d="M12 0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12c0 2.139.563 4.143 1.54 5.877L.057 23.516a.75.75 0 0 0 .927.927l5.639-1.483A11.952 11.952 0 0 0 12 24c6.627 0 12-5.373 12-12S18.627 0 12 0zm0 21.75a9.713 9.713 0 0 1-4.957-1.355l-.355-.213-3.682.967.983-3.587-.234-.369A9.713 9.713 0 0 1 2.25 12C2.25 6.615 6.615 2.25 12 2.25S21.75 6.615 21.75 12 17.385 21.75 12 21.75z"/></svg> Fale diretamente com o Gallego</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div></div>

<div class="signoff">
  <div class="signoff-msg">✝ Fé em Deus, Família e vai Corinthians! 🖤🤍</div>
  <div class="signoff-sub">UPSPRO Tecnologia · (11) 93075-1665 · www.upspro.com.br</div>
</div>
<footer><p><strong>UPSPRO Tecnologia</strong> · Movidos pela energia · Módulos de expansão e placa SNMP vendidos separadamente. Especificações sujeitas a alteração.</p></footer>

<script>
const PHONE='5511930751665';
const IMGS={"svp_costas":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","sv_diag":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","sv_frente":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","logo":"data:image/png;base64,","sl_frente":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","hp_costas":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","svpr_frente":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","hp_frente":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","hpr_rack":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","svp_frente":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","sl_diag":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","gallego":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","sv_costas":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","hp_diag":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","svpr_costas":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","svp_diag":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","sl_costas":"data:image/jpeg;base64,"};
const SOL={"slim800": {"title": "Proteção residencial e gamer", "desc": "O Slim LED 800VA é compacto, robusto e plug & play. Caixa metálica, LED RGB frontal e fusível rearmável. Protege computador, TV, Xbox Series S e modem sem complicação.", "model": "Nobreak Slim LED 800VA", "sub": "Linha Slim — Nobreak Interativo", "tagCls": "ti", "tagTxt": "Interativo", "specs": [{"l": "Potência", "v": "800VA / 400W"}, {"l": "Onda", "v": "Senoidal Aproximada"}, {"l": "Tomadas", "v": "4× NBR 14136"}, {"l": "Garantia", "v": "18 meses"}], "imgKeys": ["sl_frente", "sl_diag", "sl_costas"], "aplicacao": "residencial/gamer", "addons": [{"id": "mod", "name": "Módulo de Bateria 12V 40Ah", "desc": "Expande a autonomia · conexão plug & play", "badge": "Autonomia estendida"}], "batV": 12, "batStd": 7, "batExp": 47, "maxW": 300, "rackNote": false}, "slim2k": {"title": "Escritório e múltiplos equipamentos", "desc": "O Slim View 2KVA tem display LCD interativo com tensão, carga e autonomia em tempo real, com alarmes visuais e sonoros. Ideal para escritório, PDV e CFTV.", "model": "Nobreak Slim View 2KVA", "sub": "Linha Slim — Nobreak Interativo com LCD", "tagCls": "ti", "tagTxt": "Interativo · LCD", "specs": [{"l": "Potência", "v": "2000VA / 1200W"}, {"l": "Onda", "v": "Senoidal Aproximada"}, {"l": "Tomadas", "v": "6× NBR 14136"}, {"l": "Garantia", "v": "18 meses"}], "imgKeys": ["sv_frente", "sv_diag", "sv_costas"], "aplicacao": "escritório/comércio", "addons": [{"id": "mod", "name": "Módulo PRO II 24VDC 40Ah", "desc": "Banco externo de baterias · autonomia estendida", "badge": "Autonomia estendida"}], "batV": 24, "batStd": 14, "batExp": 54, "maxW": 900, "rackNote": false}, "svp3k": {"title": "Senoidal puro — Torre", "desc": "O Slim View Pro 3KVA entrega onda senoidal pura com DSP e True RMS. Ideal para servidores, equipamentos médicos e sistemas que exigem energia limpa.", "model": "Slim View Pro 3KVA — Torre", "sub": "Linha Slim — Nobreak Interativo Senoidal Puro", "tagCls": "ts", "tagTxt": "Senoidal Puro", "specs": [{"l": "Potência", "v": "3000VA / 2100W"}, {"l": "Onda", "v": "Senoidal Pura"}, {"l": "Tomadas", "v": "9× NBR 14136"}, {"l": "Garantia", "v": "12 meses"}], "imgKeys": ["svp_frente", "svp_diag", "svp_costas"], "aplicacao": "servidor/equipamento sensível", "addons": [{"id": "mod", "name": "Módulo PRO III 72VDC 18Ah Torre", "desc": "Banco externo de baterias · autonomia estendida", "badge": "Autonomia estendida"}], "batV": 72, "batStd": 9, "batExp": 27, "maxW": 1900, "rackNote": false}, "rack3k": {"title": "Senoidal puro — Rack", "desc": "O Slim View Pro Rack 3KVA combina senoidal pura com formato rack — ideal para armários de rede e infraestrutura de TI. O módulo de expansão de baterias é fornecido em formato TORRE e fica posicionado ao lado do rack.", "model": "Slim View Pro Rack 3KVA", "sub": "Linha Slim — Nobreak Interativo Senoidal Rack", "tagCls": "ts", "tagTxt": "Senoidal · Rack", "specs": [{"l": "Potência", "v": "3000VA / 2100W"}, {"l": "Onda", "v": "Senoidal Pura"}, {"l": "Formato", "v": "Rack 3U"}, {"l": "Tomadas", "v": "6× NBR 14136"}], "imgKeys": ["svpr_frente", "svpr_costas"], "aplicacao": "rack de TI", "addons": [{"id": "mod", "name": "Módulo PRO III 72VDC 18Ah — formato TORRE", "desc": "Banco externo posicionado ao lado do rack", "badge": "Autonomia estendida"}], "batV": 72, "batStd": 9, "batExp": 27, "maxW": 1900, "rackNote": true}, "online3k": {"title": "On-line dupla conversão — Torre", "desc": "O High Pro 3KVA Torre entrega on-line dupla conversão com transferência ZERO ms e senoidal pura. Tecnologia recomendada quando há grupo gerador no local.", "model": "High Pro 3KVA Torre — Online", "sub": "Linha High Pro — On-line Dupla Conversão", "tagCls": "to", "tagTxt": "Online · Dupla Conversão", "specs": [{"l": "Potência", "v": "3000VA / 2700W"}, {"l": "Onda", "v": "Senoidal Pura"}, {"l": "Transferência", "v": "Zero ms"}, {"l": "Garantia", "v": "12 meses"}], "imgKeys": ["hp_frente", "hp_diag", "hp_costas"], "aplicacao": "servidor crítico / data center", "addons": [{"id": "mod", "name": "Módulo PRO III 72VDC 18Ah Torre", "desc": "Banco externo de baterias · autonomia estendida", "badge": "Autonomia estendida"}, {"id": "snmp", "name": "Placa de Comunicação SNMP RJ45", "desc": "Alertas remotos via rede, e-mail e SNMP Manager", "badge": "Monitoramento remoto"}], "batV": 72, "batStd": 9, "batExp": 27, "maxW": 2400, "rackNote": false}, "rack_hp": {"title": "On-line dupla conversão — Rack", "desc": "O High Pro Rack 3KVA traz on-line dupla conversão no formato rack conversível, com 6 tomadas e transferência ZERO ms. Indicado quando há gerador no local. O módulo de expansão de baterias é fornecido em formato TORRE e fica ao lado do rack.", "model": "High Pro Rack 3KVA — Online", "sub": "Linha High Pro — On-line Dupla Conversão Rack", "tagCls": "to", "tagTxt": "Online · Rack", "specs": [{"l": "Potência", "v": "3000VA / 2700W"}, {"l": "Onda", "v": "Senoidal Pura"}, {"l": "Formato", "v": "Rack/Torre"}, {"l": "Tomadas", "v": "6× NBR 14136"}], "imgKeys": ["hpr_rack"], "aplicacao": "rack crítico / data center", "addons": [{"id": "mod", "name": "Módulo PRO III 72VDC 18Ah — formato TORRE", "desc": "Banco externo posicionado ao lado do rack", "badge": "Autonomia estendida"}, {"id": "snmp", "name": "Placa SNMP RJ45", "desc": "Monitoramento remoto via rede e alertas automáticos", "badge": "Monitoramento remoto"}], "batV": 72, "batStd": 9, "batExp": 27, "maxW": 2400, "rackNote": true}};
const NEXT={"slim800": {"name": "Slim View 2KVA"}, "slim2k": {"name": "Slim View Pro 3KVA Torre"}, "svp3k": {"name": null}, "rack3k": {"name": null}, "online3k": {"name": null}, "rack_hp": {"name": null}};
const ans={}, history=[];
let currentStep=0;

function showStep(idx){
  document.querySelectorAll('.qs').forEach(el=>el.classList.remove('show'));
  document.getElementById('qs'+idx).classList.add('show');
  currentStep=idx;
  for(let i=0;i<4;i++){
    document.getElementById('pd'+i).className='prog-dot'+(i<idx?' done':i===idx?' active':'');
  }
}

function qPick(key,val){
  ans[key]=val;
  history.push(currentStep);
  if(key==='uso'){
    if(val==='servidor'){showStep(1);}
    else{
      document.getElementById('qs3-title').textContent=val==='residencial'?'O que você precisa proteger?':'Qual é o porte do escritório?';
      const opts=val==='residencial'
        ?[{label:'Computador + modem + TV / Xbox',desc:'Até 400W',key:'slim800',icon:'🎮'},{label:'Múltiplos equipamentos em casa',desc:'Até 1.2kW',key:'slim2k',icon:'📺'}]
        :[{label:'1–2 computadores + periféricos',desc:'Até 1.2kW · PDV, CFTV',key:'slim2k',icon:'💻'},{label:'Servidor ou rack de rede',desc:'Onda senoidal pura',key:'svp3k',icon:'🗄️'}];
      document.getElementById('qs3-opts').innerHTML=opts.map(o=>`<button class="q-btn" onclick="showResult('${o.key}')">`+`<span class="q-icon">${o.icon}</span><div><div class="q-lbl">${o.label}</div><div class="q-desc">${o.desc}</div></div><span class="q-arr">›</span></button>`).join('');
      showStep(3);
    }
  }else if(key==='gerador'){showStep(2);}
  else if(key==='espaco'){
    showResult(ans.gerador==='sim'?(val==='rack'?'rack_hp':'online3k'):(val==='rack'?'rack3k':'svp3k'));
  }
}

function qBack(){if(history.length)showStep(history.pop());}

let curKey='';
const selAddons=new Set();

function showResult(key){
  curKey=key;selAddons.clear();
  const s=SOL[key];
  document.getElementById('res-h').textContent=s.title;
  document.getElementById('res-desc').textContent=s.desc;
  document.getElementById('res-tag').innerHTML=`<span class="prod-tag ${s.tagCls}">${s.tagTxt}</span>`;
  document.getElementById('res-model').textContent=s.model;
  document.getElementById('res-sub').textContent=s.sub;
  document.getElementById('res-specs').innerHTML=s.specs.map(sp=>`<div class="spec-box"><div class="spec-l">${sp.l}</div><div class="spec-v">${sp.v}</div></div>`).join('');
  document.getElementById('res-img').src=IMGS[s.imgKeys[0]];
  document.getElementById('res-thumbs').innerHTML=s.imgKeys.map((k,i)=>`<div class="res-thumb${i===0?' active':''}" onclick="resThumb(this,${i},'${s.imgKeys.join(',')}')">`+`<img src="${IMGS[k]}" alt="foto" loading="lazy"></div>`).join('');
  document.getElementById('rack-note').className=s.rackNote?'rack-note show':'rack-note';
  document.getElementById('addons-wrap').style.display=s.addons.length?'':'none';
  document.getElementById('addons-list').innerHTML=s.addons.map(a=>`<div class="addon" id="ac-${a.id}" onclick="toggleAddon('${a.id}')">`+`<div class="addon-chk" id="ach-${a.id}"></div><div style="flex:1"><div class="addon-name">${a.name}</div><div class="addon-desc">${a.desc}</div></div><span class="addon-badge">${a.badge}</span></div>`).join('');
  document.getElementById('calc-rows').innerHTML='';addRow();runCalc();updateWA();
  const rs=document.getElementById('result-section');rs.classList.add('open');
  setTimeout(()=>rs.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'start'}),80);
  document.querySelectorAll('.prog-dot').forEach(d=>d.className='prog-dot done');
}

function resThumb(el,idx,ks){
  const keys=ks.split(',');
  document.getElementById('res-img').src=IMGS[keys[idx]];
  document.querySelectorAll('.res-thumb').forEach((t,i)=>t.classList.toggle('active',i===idx));
}

function toggleAddon(id){
  const c=document.getElementById('ac-'+id),h=document.getElementById('ach-'+id);
  if(selAddons.has(id)){selAddons.delete(id);c.classList.remove('sel');h.textContent='';}
  else{selAddons.add(id);c.classList.add('sel');h.textContent='✓';}
  runCalc();updateWA();
}

function updateWA(){
  const s=SOL[curKey];
  const hasM=selAddons.has('mod'),hasS=selAddons.has('snmp');
  const ex=hasM&&hasS?' + Módulo PRO III + Placa SNMP':hasM?' + Módulo de Expansão':hasS?' + Placa SNMP':'';
  document.getElementById('res-wa').href=`https://wa.me/${PHONE}?text=${encodeURIComponent('Olá! Tenho interesse no '+s.model+ex+' para uso em '+s.aplicacao+'. Pode me enviar uma proposta?')}`;
}

function restartQuiz(){
  curKey='';selAddons.clear();Object.keys(ans).forEach(k=>delete ans[k]);history.length=0;
  document.getElementById('result-section').classList.remove('open');
  showStep(0);document.getElementById('quiz').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'});
}

function addRow(){
  const r=document.createElement('div');r.className='c-row';
  r.innerHTML=`<input class="c-name" type="text" placeholder="Equipamento (ex: Computador)" oninput="runCalc()">`+`<input class="c-w" type="number" placeholder="W" min="0" max="9999" oninput="runCalc()">`+`<button class="c-del" onclick="this.closest('.c-row').remove();runCalc();">×</button>`;
  document.getElementById('calc-rows').appendChild(r);
}

function runCalc(){
  if(!curKey)return;
  const s=SOL[curKey],hasMod=selAddons.has('mod');
  let total=0;document.querySelectorAll('.c-w').forEach(i=>{const v=parseFloat(i.value);if(!isNaN(v)&&v>0)total+=v;});
  const elL=document.getElementById('c-load'),elS=document.getElementById('c-std'),elE=document.getElementById('c-exp'),ovEl=document.getElementById('ov');
  if(total<=0){elL.textContent='— W';elL.className='c-val cm';elS.textContent='—';elS.className='c-val cm';elE.textContent='—';elE.className='c-val cm';ovEl.className='ov';return;}
  elL.textContent=total+'W';elL.className='c-val';
  const stdMin=Math.round(s.batV*s.batStd*0.85/total*60);
  elS.textContent=fmtMin(stdMin);elS.className='c-val '+(stdMin>15?'cok':stdMin>7?'cwarn':'cover');
  if(hasMod&&s.batExp>s.batStd){elE.textContent=fmtMin(Math.round(s.batV*s.batExp*0.85/total*60));elE.className='c-val cok';}
  else{elE.textContent=hasMod?'—':'+ módulo';elE.className='c-val cm';}
  if(total>s.maxW){
    ovEl.className='ov show';
    const next=NEXT[curKey];
    let title,body,waMsg;
    if(!next.name){title='⚠️ Carga acima do limite — projeto necessário';body=`Sua carga de <strong>${total}W</strong> ultrapassa o limite seguro (<strong>${s.maxW}W</strong>).<br>Nobreaks acima de 3KVA requerem <strong>instalação elétrica dedicada</strong> com disjuntor exclusivo.`;waMsg=`Olá! Preciso de um nobreak para uma carga de ${total}W. O ${s.model} não atende. Pode me ajudar?`;}
    else{title=`⚠️ Sobrecarga — recomendamos o ${next.name}`;body=`Sua carga de <strong>${total}W</strong> ultrapassa o limite seguro (<strong>${s.maxW}W</strong>).<br>Recomendamos o <strong>${next.name}</strong>.`;waMsg=`Olá! Preciso de um nobreak para ${total}W. O ${s.model} não atende — gostaria de saber sobre o ${next.name}.`;}
    document.getElementById('ov-ttl').innerHTML=title;document.getElementById('ov-body').innerHTML=body;
    document.getElementById('ov-wa').href=`https://wa.me/${PHONE}?text=${encodeURIComponent(waMsg)}`;
  }else{ovEl.className='ov';}
}

function fmtMin(m){if(m<1)return'<1 min';if(m>=60)return Math.floor(m/60)+'h '+(m%60>0?m%60+'min':'');return m+' min';}

function setImg(cardIdx,photoIdx){
  const card=document.querySelector('[data-card="'+cardIdx+'"]');if(!card)return;
  const thumbImgs=card.querySelectorAll('.gallery-thumbs .thumb img');
  const mainImg=card.querySelector('#card-img-'+cardIdx);
  if(mainImg&&thumbImgs[photoIdx])mainImg.src=thumbImgs[photoIdx].src;
  card.querySelectorAll('.thumb').forEach((t,i)=>t.classList.toggle('active',i===photoIdx));
}

const revObs=new IntersectionObserver(entries=>{entries.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.classList.add('visible');revObs.unobserve(e.target);}});},{threshold:0.07});
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach((el,i)=>{el.style.transitionDelay=(i*.08)+'s';revObs.observe(el);});
</script>

</body>
</html>
